title.en: From Mold Development to Stable Production
title.zh: 从模具开发到稳定量产

subtitle.en: Heanxin supports custom plastic projects from requirement review, mold design and injection molding to insert molding, assembly, quality inspection and delivery.
subtitle.zh: 禾安鑫支持从需求评审、模具设计、注塑生产到嵌件注塑、组装、品质检验与交付的定制塑胶项目。

desc.en: Stable production for small and medium custom plastic parts with process and appearance control.
desc.zh: 面向中小型定制塑胶件的稳定注塑生产，兼顾工艺、尺寸和外观控制。

desc.en: Tooling support from drawings, samples or product ideas through design, machining and trial molding.
desc.zh: 根据图纸、样品或产品想法完成模具设计、加工与试模支持。

desc.en: Metal inserts, nuts, pins and screws integrated with plastic for stronger functional structures.
desc.zh: 将五金嵌件、螺母、金属针或螺丝与塑胶结合，形成更强的功能结构。

desc.en: Plastic, hardware, screws and simple accessories assembled, packed and prepared for shipment.
desc.zh: 提供塑胶件、五金件、螺丝及简单配件装配、包装和出货准备。

desc.en: Flexible support for drawings, samples, colors, surface processes, logos and packaging.
desc.zh: 支持图纸、样品、颜色、表面工艺、LOGO 加工与包装方案等定制需求。

desc.en: Inspection from incoming material and trial molding to production, assembly and final shipment.
desc.zh: 从来料、试模、注塑、组装到出货的流程检验，保障批量一致性。

subtitle.en: A clear workflow helps buyers know what to prepare and when key manufacturing decisions are made.
subtitle.zh: 清晰流程帮助买家了解需要准备哪些资料，以及制造决策在哪些阶段完成。

desc.en: Discuss product use, drawings, samples and quantity.
desc.zh: 沟通产品用途、图纸、样品和数量。

desc.en: Review structure, material, DFM and quotation direction.
desc.zh: 评估结构、材料、DFM 和报价方向。

desc.en: Build the mold after design confirmation.
desc.zh: 设计确认后进行模具制造。

desc.en: Trial mold, inspect samples and tune the process.
desc.zh: 试模、检查样品并优化工艺。

desc.en: Run stable production after sample approval.
desc.zh: 样品确认后进入稳定量产。

desc.en: Inspect, assemble, pack and ship the order.
desc.zh: 检验、组装、包装并完成出货。

subtitle.en: We work from samples, 2D drawings, 3D files or custom requirements to support efficient sampling and reliable mass production.
subtitle.zh: 可根据样品、2D 图纸、3D 文件或定制需求进行开发，支持高效打样与稳定量产。

desc.en: Confirm drawings, samples and target use.
desc.zh: 确认图纸、样品和目标用途。

desc.en: Check structure, draft and tooling risks.
desc.zh: 检查结构、脱模和开模风险。

desc.en: Design mold structure for production.
desc.zh: 设计适合量产的模具结构。

desc.en: Machine, assemble and fit the mold.
desc.zh: 完成模具加工、装配与合模。

desc.en: Produce samples for dimension and appearance review.
desc.zh: 生产样品用于尺寸和外观确认。

desc.en: Move into stable production after approval.
desc.zh: 确认后进入稳定批量生产。

desc.en: Tooling from drawings, samples or product requirements.
desc.zh: 支持图纸、样品或项目需求开模。

desc.en: Capacity for varied small and medium plastic products.
desc.zh: 覆盖多类中小型塑胶产品生产。

title.zh: 稳定 OEM / ODM 生产

desc.en: Process control supports repeated production orders.
desc.zh: 通过过程管控支持多批次稳定交付。

title.en: Ready to review your plastic part project?
title.zh: 准备评估您的塑胶件项目？

desc.en: Send drawings, samples, material requirements and quantity so our team can evaluate tooling and production feasibility.
desc.zh: 发送图纸、样品、材料要求和数量，我们会评估开模与生产可行性。
